texto: The problem with confronting people who make these comments is that the most you will get out of it is mockery and reprisal by superiors. You are just one girl who got offended by the comment, while so many others adhere to it.
explicacao: Citação de Kaitlyn Scarboro sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The problem with confronting people who make these comments is that the most you will get out of …” articula reflexao, sexism, problem em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
